Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award.
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)
